title: KERNEL: Crazy fast, open source infra for AI agents to use the Internet | Y Combinator
title_zh: KERNEL：为AI智能体提供极速开源互联网基础设施
full_text:
KERNEL: Crazy fast, open source infra for AI agents to use the Internet | Y Combinator
Home › Companies › KERNEL
KERNEL
Crazy fast, open source infra for AI agents to use the Internet
Summer 2025
Active
Developer Tools
Cloud Computing
Infrastructure
AI
San Francisco
https://www.kernel.sh
Crazy fast, open source infra for AI agents to use the Internet
Kernel is crazy fast, open source infra for AI agents to access the internet 🧠🕸️
- Built on unikernels for crazy fast cold starts and low resource usage
- Sub-150ms cold starts on managed headful browsers
- Built-in stealth mode with residential proxies and automatic CAPTCHA solving
- Full observability: session recording, live view, and full logs
- Persistent sessions that maintain cookies and auth across invocations
- Native support for all browser and computer use frameworks
- SOC 2 compliant and HIPAA-ready
Trusted by Cash App, Rye, and 1000+ others. Backed by Accel & Y Combinator (S25).
Active Founders
Catherine Jue
Co-Founder & CEO
Co-Founder and CEO @ Kernel. Previously co-founder @ Sway Finance (S16)

Rafael Garcia

Co-founder and CTO at Kernel. We're making browser infra fast.

Oct 09, 2025
Company Launches
Kernel: Crazy Fast Browser Infrastructure
See original launch post
Hey everyone! We’re Catherine and Raf, the founders of Kernel.
https://youtu.be/vexAn3_KYvc
🤝 TLDR:
We make an API to instantly launch browsers in the cloud so AI can use the internet just like humans do.
🚀 What’s Kernel?
Kernel is the best place in the world to launch web agents and browser automations. We handle the hard parts of running browser infrastructure in the cloud so you don’t have to: spinning up browsers quickly, responsive read/write live view, logs, headless vs. headful mode, residential proxies, and more.
Our edge is an infrastructure platform that’s flexible, observable, and insanely fast from day one:
Performance - web automations and Computer Use agents can launch and connect to Kernel browsers in 300 milliseconds
Isolation x telemetry - Kernel browsers run in isolated virtual machines and ship with live views & replays so you can see exactly what your agent saw and take control when needed
Agent runtime - launch your web agent on Kernel’s code execution platform to seamlessly connect it to a browser in the cloud
Simple, clear pricing - pay only for the resources you use. Our straightforward pricing model makes it easy to predict usage costs
⚡️ How does it work?
Kernel’s API makes it simple to launch browsers in the cloud and automate anything on the internet. We work with any browser/web agent framework : Playwright, Puppeteer, Browser Use, Magnitude, and more. Users love our platform for:
Instant browser spin-ups on-demand
VM logs & read/write live view
Video replays
Browser session reuse
Residential proxies and auto-CAPTCHA solvers
Turn any agent into a https endpoint — we host your agent, you invoke it on-demand with a prompt
& much more soon!
👨‍💻👩‍💻 The Team
Raf and Catherine started Kernel from the shared belief that cloud infrastructure can be 100x better. We believe that well-designed, opinionated tooling unlocks superpowers, and we’re passionate about building best-in-class infrastructure for the next generation of AI applications.
Before starting Kernel, Raf was the co-founder/CTO of Clever (YC S12), which exited for $500m in 2021. Catherine was the co-founder of Sway Finance (YC S16) and most recently led Cash App’s team of forward deployed engineers and Cash App’s docs platform.
🙏 Our Ask
If you:
Run browser automations
Built a web agent locally and want to run it in production
Maintain browser containers but want to outsource the infrastructure because it’s not core to your IP
Check out our platform to sign-up, or schedule a demo with us here .
KERNEL
Founded: 2025
Batch: Summer 2025
Team Size: 6
Status:
Active
Location: San Francisco
Primary Partner: Tyler Bosmeny
